note: Upstash Redis pay-as-you-go vs fixed plan economics. PAYG bills per command; fixed plans give unlimited commands under a TPS cap. First 1GB storage is free on PAYG. A free command tier exists but its exact volume varies by region/offering and is NOT modeled (conservative; negligible vs waste-case command volume). Cross-check the source before any billing decision.

sources.what: PAYG $0.20 per 100k requests; storage limit and TPS cap (Fly-hosted Upstash)
Free tier for prototypes; pay-as-you-go from $0.20 per 100K commands
Redis pricing comparison 2026: first 1 GB storage free on PAYG; fixed plan ladder
